confidence_rationale: Clear view of all transfers and placements. All objects appear to be properly placed on pegs with no visible drops or penalties. Time estimate based on frame progression is reliable.

technique_summary: Expert-level performance with efficient transfers, clean handoffs, and no visible penalties. Completion time of 78 seconds falls within expert benchmark range.
strengths: Proper completion of both transfer directions
improvement_suggestions: Could potentially reduce time by optimizing instrument positioning between transfers
